option.name: filePath
option.value: /Musique (snapshot).java

option.value: //fichier model a supprimer

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox prefWidth="320.0" spacing="10.0" styleClass="gallery-card" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.EvenementCardController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="12.0" left="12.0" right="12.0" top="12.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <VBox spacing="3.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label fx:id="titreLabel" styleClass="gallery-name" text="Titre evenement" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="typeLabel" styleClass="gallery-capacity" text="Type: -" /> </VBox> <Button fx:id="detailsButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onToggleDetails" styleClass="secondary-action-button" text="Voir details" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="statutLabel" styleClass="gallery-meta" text="Statut: -" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="dateDebutLabel" styleClass="gallery-meta" text="Debut: -" wrapText="true" />
<HBox alignment="CENTER_RIGHT" spacing="8.0"> <Button mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onDeleteClick" styleClass="danger-action-button" text="Supprimer" /> </HBox>
<VBox fx:id="detailsBox" managed="false" spacing="6.0" styleClass="gallery-details" visible="false"> <padding> <Insets bottom="8.0" left="8.0" right="8.0" top="8.0" /> </padding> <Label fx:id="descriptionLabel" styleClass="gallery-meta" text="Description: -" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="dateFinLabel" styleClass="gallery-meta" text="Fin: -" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="dateCreationLabel" styleClass="gallery-meta" text="Creation: -" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="capaciteLabel" styleClass="gallery-meta" text="Capacite max: -" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="prixLabel" styleClass="gallery-meta" text="Prix ticket: -" wrapText="true" /> <Label fx:id="relationLabel" styleClass="gallery-meta" text="Galerie ID: - | Artiste ID: -" wrapText="true" /> </VBox> </VBox>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="8.0" styleClass="page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1"> <padding> <Insets bottom="20.0" left="26.0" right="20.0" top="24.0" /> </padding> <children> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Evenements" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle" text="Planning et suivi des evenements" /> </children> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/25" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.EvenementsController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="18.0" left="18.0" right="18.0" top="16.0" /> </padding>
<VBox spacing="4.0"> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Gestion des evenements" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle" text="Affichage et suppression des evenements" /> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="list-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="14.0" left="14.0" right="14.0" top="14.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <TextField fx:id="rechercheField" promptText="Rechercher evenement (titre, type, statut...)" styleClass="gallery-search-field" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label text="Trier par" /> <ComboBox fx:id="filtreComboBox" prefWidth="230.0" styleClass="gallery-sort-combo" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="emptyStateLabel" managed="false" styleClass="section-subtitle" text="Aucun evenement trouve." visible="false" />
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="gallery-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <GridPane fx:id="evenementsListContainer" hgap="12.0" styleClass="gallery-flow" vgap="12.0"> <padding> <Insets bottom="6.0" left="2.0" right="2.0" top="6.0" /> </padding> </GridPane> </ScrollPane> </VBox> </VBox>
